content:
🌟 yj_nearbyglasses | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To alert users to the potential presence of nearby smart glasses, serving as a privacy-protection tool.
✨ Key Features: • Detects nearby smart glasses via Bluetooth signals • Warns the user of potential smart glasses presence • Free and open-source • No telemetry or data collection from the app itself • Local log file export (user-controlled)
📖 Summary: This Android application, written in Kotlin, aims to detect nearby smart glasses by analyzing their Bluetooth signals and alerting the user. It focuses on privacy by not collecting user data, but warns of potential false positives and advises extreme caution in interpreting its alerts.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
